titleStmt.title: SII 35.50: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 50. (A.R. No. 81 of 1950-51.) RĀMATĪRTHA, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone standing near the Rāmasvāmi temple.

This damaged inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI). The date is insufficient for verification. Refers to the authority of the Kadamba feudatory Sāntayadēva over Banavāsi-12000 and Pānuṁgal-500. Mentions his queen (name lost).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaḥstuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūḷasta
ṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithuvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabhaṭharakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyabharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire
tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāmaṁṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ ba
navāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ jayantimadhukēśvaradēvalabdavaraprasāda mri
gamadāmōda traikṣakṣāsaṁbhavaṁ caturāsītanagarādīṣṭita lā
ṭalōcanacatu¨rbhuja jagadviditāṣṭāda sāsva
dīkṣādīkṣita himadagirīṁdra ruṁdra sikharasākṣi saṁstacatu
staṁbhabakamadagaja mahāmahīpāḷakuḷabhūṣaṇaṁ pemmaṭa to
vama mahāmahīpāḷaṁbhūṣaṇaṁ pe¨rmāṭi tū
ṣaṇaṁ śākhācarēṁdra dvajavirājamāna mānū
bāṇada tā¨rthikāṁcana samarajayakāraṇa
mā kāḷuvaragaṇḍa pratāpamā¨rttaṇḍa nā
śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara sāntayadēva
ramumaṁ pānuṁgalaynoṟaṟubha
nigraha siṣṭapratipāḷana
dadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire ©
bhyudaya śahasraphaḷabhō
yarappa śrīmatu piriya
viyaru svasti śrī ma
saṁvatsarada puśyasu
¨ryya grahaṇadalu
vatidva va
¨rbyabādhāpari
vāra
Digital edition of SII 35.50 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
